name: Junyan
description: A place where the things that wove cobwebs in me live.
why: The Nest has always been a means to an end. It occurred to me that the things I made-no matter how important they were in my heart-were not truly alive without a place to live, and maybe be seen. With only webdev experience from my 7th grade programming class, I embarked on this journey alone and would not have succeeded without the help of Claude AI. All in all, it took about 10 hours to initially set up the site and it's basic functions. The things on it took much longer, as they rightfully should. The site is conceived up, developed, and maintained without outside help and will always be.
HeroBio: Michael is usually what people call me. Junyan is fine too. It's pronounced Joon-Yan. More personality, since my mom named me Michael over some hot guy she saw on a TV show. I go to school in Stony Brook, but my home is in Shanghai, China. I listen to music, write my own songs and book reviews, and occasionally spin up a novel. This will be updated when I have a better idea of what to write
